criteria.label: System Latency
criteria.description: Ability to maintain sub-100ms response times for core CRM operations.

criteria.label: Feature Set
criteria.description: Availability of integrated ticketing, knowledge base, and analytics modules.

criteria.label: TCO
criteria.description: Total expenditure including licensing, implementation, and support within the 20k budget.

criteria.label: Payment Terms
criteria.description: Alignment of payment cycles with internal cash flow (e.g., 60 days net).

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Strict adherence to GDPR Art. 28 and German data protection regulations.

criteria.label: Support SLA
criteria.description: Availability of technical support during CET business hours or beyond.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Requirement for data to be hosted within Germany or the EU to satisfy legal constraints.
